message:
fix(core): unify SQLite truthiness evaluation via numeric coercion

Change is_sqlite_truthy() to use to_float() for consistent truthiness
evaluation. The previous pattern-match approach only recognized literal
Integer(0) and Float(0.0) as falsy, but SQLite considers any value that
coerces to numeric zero as false (e.g., string "0", blob of zeros).
This aligns with the same fix applied to CHECK constraint evaluation
in deterministic_rebase.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
